ItacPersonItem.Notes: For details regading his membership among the Accesi, see Bergamini, `Dai Gelati alla Renia`. Publications non in BL collections include: Rime varie di CM. Maggi accademico Gelato ed Acceso, Bologna, 1696. Dedication to Fava, with mention of the Accademia degli Accesi, is in the Bolognese 1689 edition of his Rime.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
